title: Locationing device for a machining point on a workpiece
abstract: A device for determining a location on an elongated workpiece, characterized in that the device comprises:a frame movable in a first direction, preferably in a longitudinal direction of the workpiece, po- sitioning means to position the frame in relation to the sides of the workpiece,movable means movable in a second direction, prefera- bly in a transverse direction with respect to the frame,a measuring point, the movement in first direction and second direction used to move measuring point in said directions, measuring equipment for determining the location of the measuring point in transverse and longitudinal respect to the workpiece.
claims: Claims Claims 1. A device (100) for determining a location on an elongated workpiece and being manually movable on the workpiece, characterized in that the device (100) comprises: -a frame (102) movable in a first direction, preferably in a longitudinal direction of the workpiece, consequently moving the whole device (102) on the workpiece in said direction, -positioning means (106) to position the frame (102) in relation to the sides of the workpiece, wherein the positioning means (106) fix the frame (102) so that the frame (102) doesn't move in a second direction but so that the frame (102) may move in the longitudinal direction of the workpiece, -movable means (104) movable in the second direction, preferably in a transverse direction in relation to the workpiece and with respect to the frame (102), -a measuring point (108), the movement in first direction and second direction be- ing used to move measuring point (108) in said directions, -measuring equipment (1 10a, 1 10b, 1 10c) for determining the location of the measuring point (108) in transverse and longitudinal respect to the workpiece. 2. The device (100) of claim 1, wherein the measuring equipment (1 10a, 1 10b, 1 10c) comprise at least one laser distance meter for measuring the longitudinal distance to a point of reference such as one end of the elongated workpiece. 3. The device (100) of claim 1, wherein the measuring equipment (1 10a, 1 10b, 1 10c) comprise at least two laser distance meters for measuring the distance to two points of references preferably on opposite sides of the frame. 4. The device ( 100) according to any preceding claim 1 , the device ( 100) further comprising second movable means (109) for moving the measuring point perpen- dicularly in relation to the workpiece. 5. The device (100) of any preceding claim, wherein the measuring equipment (1 10a, 1 10b, 1 10c, 1 lOd, 1 lOe) comprises an optical sensor for measuring movement in the second direction, which optical sensor detects distance by moving linearly with the movable means (104) in the transverse direction in relation to a sur- face of the frame (102) of the device (100) and/or surface of the workpiece. 6. The device (100) of any preceding claim, wherein the measuring equipment (1 10a, 1 10b, 1 10c, 1 lOd, 1 lOe) comprises a magnetic sensor (1 lOd) for measuring movement in the second direction, which magnetic sensor (1 lOd) detects distance by moving linearly with the movable means (104) in the transverse direction in relation and in connection with a magnetic strip on the frame (102) of the device (100). 7. The device (100) of any of claims 1-6, wherein the measuring equipment (1 10a, 1 10b, 1 10c, 1 lOd, 1 lOe) comprises an optical sensor for measuring movement in the second direction, which optical sensor detects distance from rotational movement of a leadscrew or drive screw used to move the movable means (104). 8. The device (100) of any preceding claim, wherein the device (100) comprises attachment means (1 12) for attaching tools to the frame (102). 9. The device (100) of claim 8, wherein the attachment means (1 12) comprises a cradle for a tool. 10. The device (100) of claim 8, wherein the attachment means (1 12) comprises a cradle and band attachment means (1 14) for facilitating a grip support for a magnetic drill. 1 1. The device (100) of claim 8, wherein the cradle comprises rolling sphere units (120) facilitating movement and load transfer between the workpiece and the tool on the cradle. 12. The device (100) of any preceding claim, wherein the measuring point (108) comprises a center punch and/or allows the use of a center punch, preferably through a hole. 13. The device (100) of any preceding claim, wherein the measuring equipment (1 10a, 1 10b, 1 10c, 1 lOd, 1 lOe) comprises an angle sensor (1 16), preferably functionally connected to the attachment means (1 12), for determining the position of the attached tool. 14. The device (100) of any preceding claim, wherein the positioning means (106) comprise rolls facilitating longitudinal movement of the frame (102). 15. The device (100) of claim 14, wherein the measuring equipment (1 10a, 1 10b, 1 10c) comprises pulse sensors functionally connected to the rolls of the positioning means. 16. The device (100) of any preceding claim, comprising rolling means at the bottom of the frame facilitating longitudinal movement of the frame (102). 17. The device (100) of claim 16, wherein the measuring equipment (1 10a, 1 10b, 1 10c) comprises pulse sensors at the rolling means for measuring the longitudinal movement of the frame (102) on the workpiece.
